title: YouTube Poop: Story Animation of Worm Tales
description:
This one ought to take all you cartoon buffs back a few years...first one to name the show without cheating wins a cookie.

No idea what the name is supposed to mean.  It was the only grammatically sensical phrase I could make by mixing up the title cards.

The intro was done by me (using MrSimon's logo), specifically for this poop.  I don't plan to use it again, but if you want it for your own magical purposes, just ask.

Idk if this is as good as my first two, but it's got some good parts in it.
